from wamex_reports
join drilling_summaries on drilling_summaries.anumber = wamex_reports.anumber
join documents on documents.anumber = wamex_reports.anumber
join geo_chemistry on geo_chemistry.anumber = wamex_reports.anumber
join historic_titles on historic_titles.anumber = wamex_reports.anumber
where lower(geo_chemistry.sampletype) like '%auger%'
  and lower(wamex_reports.targetcommoditiesnames) like '%gold%'
  and lower(wamex_reports.projectname) like '%north forrestania%'
  and drilling_summaries.totaldrilled <= 9552
limit 50

inner join storages on wamex_reports.anumber = storages.anumber

select wamex_reports.anumber from wamex_reports

from wamex_reports as t1

where

  and t1.projectname like '%moyagee - murchison%'
  and t1.reportdate = '2017-02-22'
  and (t1.targetcommoditiesnames like '%gold%' or t1.targetcommoditiesnames like '%copper%' or t1.targetcommoditiesnames like '%zinc%')
  and t1.confidentiality like '%open file%'
  and t1.keywords like '%geophysics%'
  and t2.sampletype like '%rock%'
  and t2.numberofsamples <= 113
limit 50

join abstracts on abstracts.ANumber = wamex_reports.ANumber
join storages on storages.Anumber = wamex_reports.ANumber
join geo_chemistry on geo_chemistry.ANumber = wamex_reports.ANumber
where lower(wamex_reports.Keywords) like '%ground magnetic surveys%'
  and wamex_reports.ProjectName = 'Leinster'
  and lower(wamex_reports.AuthorNames) like '%sharp d r%'
  and lower(wamex_reports.Operators) like '%western mining corporation ltd%'
limit 50

select wamex_reports.anumber from wamex_reports join drilling_summaries on drilling_summaries.anumber = wamex_reports.anumber where lower(wamex_reports.operators) like '%sipa exploration nl%' and lower(wamex_reports.confidentiality) = 'open file' and lower(wamex_reports.keywords) like '%ip surveys%' and drilling_summaries.totaldrilled = 704 and exists (select 1 from abstracts where abstracts.anumber = wamex_reports.anumber) and exists (select 1 from digital_files where digital_files.anumber = wamex_reports.anumber) and exists (select 1 from geo_chemistry where geo_chemistry.anumber = wamex_reports.anumber) limit 50

join abstracts on abstracts.anumber = wamex_reports.anumber
join digital_files on digital_files.anumber = wamex_reports.anumber
join historic_titles on historic_titles.anumber = wamex_reports.anumber
where lower(wamex_reports.operators) like '%mt edon gold mines nl%'
  and drilling_summaries.numberofholes >= 816
  and drilling_summaries.totaldrilled >= 72624

limit 50

join documents on documents.anumber = wamex_reports.anumber
